summary: Iteration 18: Frontend UI testing for mobile service pages, commercial appliance repair, and brand logo improvements. All 14 test features PASSED. Glass navbar working on mobile (rgba(240, 248, 255, 0.85) + blur(12px)), breadcrumbs with white background, WE SERVICE section with 8 brand logos in 4-column grid with light gray card backgrounds, NO text labels on service page brand logos. Mobile /commercial-appliance-repair uses MobileServiceLanding template with correct hero title, COMMON ISSUES WE FIX section with commercial issues, and sticky bottom bar. Desktop /brands shows all 25 brand cards with logo + name + specialty tag. Viking and Jenn-Air logos display clearly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MobileServiceLanding.js is the reusable mobile template for all service pages (breakpoint <768px). Desktop uses ApplianceRepairPageNew template. Glass navbar style: rgba(240, 248, 255, 0.85) + backdropFilter blur(12px). Brand logos stored at /images/brands/*.svg and *.png. Mobile WE SERVICE section uses 4-column grid with #F8FAFC card backgrounds. Desktop service pages show brand logos WITHOUT text labels. BrandsPage shows all 25 brands with logo + text name + specialty tag.

test_1_glass_navbar.details: Glass navbar visible with rgba(240, 248, 255, 0.85) background and backdropFilter blur(12px). FixitBay LLC text, phone button, and hamburger menu all present.

test_4_we_service_brand_logos.details: WE SERVICE section shows 8 brand logos (Sub-Zero, Viking, Thermador, LG, Whirlpool, Samsung, Bosch, GE) in 4-column grid with #F8FAFC light gray card backgrounds

test_5_no_text_labels_on_logos.details: Brand logos have NO text labels underneath (logo only)

test_7_commercial_hero_title.details: Hero title shows 'Commercial Appliance Repair. Priority Service.'

test_8_commercial_issues.details: COMMON ISSUES WE FIX section shows commercial issues: Equipment Down, Walk-in Cooler, Oven/Range, Laundry Equipment, Error Codes, Leaks/Safety

test_9_commercial_brands.details: WE SERVICE section shows 8 brand logos for commercial page

test_10_sticky_bottom_bar.details: Sticky bottom bar present with Call, Book, Text buttons. Position: fixed, bottom: 0px, display: grid

test_11_brands_page_25_cards.details: Desktop /brands page shows all 25 brand cards with logo + text name + specialty tag

test_12_viking_logo_clean.details: Viking logo shows clean 'VIKING' text (SVG format, not watermark). Size: 300x75 natural, 40px displayed height

test_13_jenn_air_logo_clear.details: Jenn-Air logo shows clearly with maxHeight 40px (properly sized, not tiny)

test_14_desktop_service_logos_no_text.details: Desktop /refrigerator-repair 'Brands We Service' section shows 18 brand logos WITHOUT text labels (logo only)
